name: anthropic-compatible
description: Any Anthropic-compatible (Messages API) endpoint. Supply the base URL + API key.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Base URL
x-meta.help: The Anthropic-compatible base URL, e.g. https://my-gateway.

x-meta.label: API Key
x-meta.help: API key for the endpoint. Leave empty to fall back to the ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Default Model
x-meta.help: The Anthropic model id served by your endpoint.
